verse.verse_6: Litunżira qaumam mā unżira ābā'uhum fahum gāfilūn(a).
verse.verse_7: Laqad ḥaqqal-qaulu ‘alā akṡarihim fahum lā yu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_8: Innā ja‘alnā fī a‘nāqihim aglālan fa hiya ilal-ażqāni fahum muqmaḥūn(a).
verse.verse_9: Wa ja‘alnā mim baini aidīhim saddaw wa min khalfihim saddan fa agsyaināhum fahum lā yubṣirūn(a).
verse.verse_10: Wa sawā'un ‘alaihim a'anżartahum am lam tunżirhum lā yu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_11: Innamā tunżiru manittaba‘aż-żikra  wa khasyiyar-raḥmāna bil-gaib(i), fa basysyirhu bimagfiratiw wa ajrin karīm(in).
verse.verse_12: Innā naḥnu nuḥyil-mautā wa naktubu mā qaddamū wa āṡārahum, wa kulla syai'in aḥṣaināhu fī imāmim mubīn(in).
verse.verse_13: Waḍrib lahum maṡalan aṣḥābal-qaryah(ti), iż jā'ahal-mursalūn(a).
verse.verse_14: Iż arsalnā ilaihimuṡnaini fa każżabūhumā fa ‘azzaznā biṡāliṡin faqālū innā ilaikum mursalūn(a).
verse.verse_15: Qālū mā antum illā basyarum miṡlunā, wa mā anzalar-raḥmānu min syai'(in), in antum illā takżibūn(a).
verse.verse_16: Qālū rabbunā ya‘lamu innā ilaikum lamursalūn(a).
verse.verse_18: Qālū innā taṭayyarnā bikum, la'il lam tantahū lanarjumannakum wa layamassannakum minnā ‘ażābun alīm(un).
verse.verse_19: Qālū ṭā'irukum ma‘akum, a'in żukkirtum, bal antum qaumum musrifūn(a).
verse.verse_20: Wa jā'a min aqṣal-madīnati rajuluy yas‘ā qāla yā qaumittabi‘ul-mursalīn(a).
verse.verse_21: Ittabi‘ū mal lā yas'alukum ajraw wa hum muhtadūn(a).
verse.verse_22: Wa mā liya lā a‘budul-lażī faṭaranī wa ilaihi turja‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_23: A'attakhiżu min dūnihī ālihatan iy yuridnir-raḥmānu biḍurril lā tugni ‘annī syafā‘atuhum syai'aw wa lā yunqiżūn(i).
verse.verse_26: Qīladkhulil-jannah(ta), qāla yā laita qaumī ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_27: Bimā gafaralī rabbī wa ja‘alanī minal-mukramīn(a).
verse.verse_28: Wa mā anzalnā ‘alā qaumihī mim ba‘dihī min jundim minas-samā'i wa mā kunnā munzilīn(a).
verse.verse_29: In kānat illā ṣaiḥataw wāḥidatan fa'iżā hum khāmidūn(a).
verse.verse_30: Yā ḥasratan ‘alal-‘ibād(i), mā ya'tīhim mir rasūlin illā kānū bihī yastahzi'ūn(a).
verse.verse_31: Alam yarau kam ahlaknā qablahum minal-qurūni annahum ilaihim lā yarji‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_32: Wa in kullul lammā jamī‘ul ladainā muḥḍarūn(a).
verse.verse_33: Wa āyatul lahumul-arḍul-maitah(tu), aḥyaināhā wa akhrajnā minhā ḥabban faminhu ya'kulūn(a).
verse.verse_34: Wa ja‘alnā fīhā jannātim min nakhīliw wa a‘nābiw wa fajjarnā fīhā minal-‘uyūn(i).
verse.verse_35: Liya'kulū min ṡamarihī wa mā ‘amilathu aidīhim, afalā yasykurūn(a).
verse.verse_36: Subḥānal-lażī khalaqal-azwāja kullahā mimmā tumbitul-arḍu wa min anfusihim wa mimmā lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_37: Wa āyatul lahumul-lailu naslakhu minhun-nahāra fa'iżā hum muẓlimūn(a).
verse.verse_38: Wasy-syamsu tajrī limustaqarril lahā, żālika taqdīrul-‘azīzil-‘alīm(i).
verse.verse_40: Lasy-syamsu yambagī lahā an tudrikal-qamara wa lal-lailu sābiqun-nahār(i), wa kullun fī falakiy yasbaḥūn(a).
verse.verse_41: Wa āyatul lahum annā ḥamalnā żurriyyatahum fil-fulkil-masyḥūn(i).
verse.verse_42: Wa khalaqnā lahum mim miṡlihī mā yarkabūn(a).
verse.verse_43: Wa in nasya' nugriqhum falā ṣarīkha lahum wa lā hum yunqażūn(a).
verse.verse_44: Illā raḥmatam minnā wa matā‘an ilā ḥīn(in).
verse.verse_45: Wa iżā qīla lahumuttaqū mā baina aidīkum wa mā khalfakum la‘allakum turḥamūn(a).
verse.verse_46: Wa mā ta'tīhim min āyatim min āyāti rabbihim illā kānū ‘anhā mu‘riḍīn(a).
verse.verse_47: Wa iżā qīla lahum anfiqū mimmā razaqakumullāh(u), qālal-lażīna kafarū lil-lażīna āmanū anuṭ‘imu mal lau yasyā'ullāhu aṭ‘amah(ū), in antum illā fī ḍalālim mubīn(in).
verse.verse_48: Wa yaqūlūna matā hāżal-wa‘du in kuntum ṣādiqīn(a).
verse.verse_49: Mā yanẓurūna illā ṣaiḥataw wāḥidatan ta'khużuhum wa hum yakhiṣṣimūn(a).
verse.verse_50: Falā yastaṭī‘ūna tauṣiyataw wa lā ilā ahlihim yarji‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_51: Wa nufikha fiṣ-ṣūri fa'iżā hum minal-ajdāṡi ilā rabbihim yansilūn(a).
verse.verse_52: Qālū yā wailanā mam ba‘aṡanā mim marqadinā…hāżā mā wa‘adar-raḥmānu wa ṣadaqal-mursalūn(a).
verse.verse_53: In kānat illā ṣaiḥataw wāḥidatan fa'iżā hum jamī‘ul ladainā muḥḍarūn(a).
verse.verse_54: Fal-yauma lā tuẓlamu nafsun syai'aw wa lā tujzauna illā mā kuntum ta‘malūn(a).
verse.verse_56: Hum wa azwājuhum fī ẓilālin ‘alal-arā'iki muttaki'ūn(a).
verse.verse_57: Lahum fīhā fākihatuw wa lahum mā yadda‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_60: Alam a‘had ilaikum yā banī ādama allā ta‘budusy-syaiṭān(a), innahū lakum ‘aduwwum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_62: Wa laqad aḍalla minkum jibillan kaṡīrā(n), afalam takūnū ta‘qilūn(a).
verse.verse_65: Al-yauma nakhtimu ‘alā afwāhihim wa tukallimunā aidīhim wa tasyhadu arjuluhum bimā kānū yaksibūn(a).
verse.verse_66: Wa lau nasyā'u laṭamasnā ‘alā a‘yunihim fastabaquṣ-ṣirāṭa fa annā yubṣirūn(a).
verse.verse_67: Wa lau nasyā'u lamasakhnāhum ‘alā makānatihim famastaṭā‘ū muḍiyyaw wa lā yarji‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_68: Wa man nu‘ammirhu nunakkishu fil-khalq(i), afalā ya‘qilūn(a).
verse.verse_69: Wa mā ‘allamnāhusy-syi‘ra wa mā yambagī lah(ū), in huwa illā żikruw wa qur'ānum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_70: Liyunżira man kāna ḥayyaw wa yaḥiqqal-qaulu ‘alal-kāfirīn(a).
verse.verse_71: Awalam yarau annā khalaqnā lahum mimmā ‘amilat aidīnā an‘āman fahum lahā mālikūn(a).
verse.verse_72: Wa żallalnāhā lahum fa minhā rakūbuhum wa minhā ya'kulūn(a).
verse.verse_73: Wa lahum fīhā manāfi‘u wa masyārib(u), afalā yasykurūn(a).
verse.verse_74: Wattakhażū min dūnillāhi ālihatal la‘allahum yunṣarūn(a).
verse.verse_75: Lā yastaṭī‘ūna naṣrahum, wa hum lahum jundum muḥḍarūn(a).
verse.verse_76: Falā yaḥzunka qauluhum, innā na‘lamu mā yusirrūna wa mā yu‘linūn(a).
verse.verse_77: Awalam yaral-insānu annā khalaqnāhu min nuṭfatin fa'iżā huwa khaṣīmum mubīn(un).
verse.verse_78: Wa ḍaraba lanā maṡalaw wa nasiya khalqah(ū), qāla may yuḥyil-‘iẓāma wa hiya ramīm(un).
verse.verse_79: Qul yuḥyīhal-lażī ansya'ahā awwala marrah(tin), wa huwa bikulli khalqin ‘alīm(un).
verse.verse_80: Allażī ja‘ala lakum minasy-syajaril-akhḍari nārā(n), fa'iżā antum minhu tūqidūn(a).
verse.verse_81: Awa laisal-lażī khalaqas-samāwāti wal-arḍa biqādirin ‘alā ay yakhluqa miṡlahum, balā wa huwal-khallāqul-‘alīm(u).
verse.verse_82: Innamā amruhū iżā arāda syai'an ay yaqūla lahū kun fa yakūn(u).
verse.verse_83: Fa subḥānal-lażī biyadihī malakūtu kulli syai'iw wa ilaihi turja‘ūn(a).
